# Assessment Overview

This overview links to supplementary assessment documents that were generated and copied into this report.

- **[Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md)** — High-level and component-level application architecture diagrams.
- **[Dependency Map](dependency-map.md)** — External dependency categories, versions, and compatibility observations.
- **[API & Service Contracts](api-service-contracts.md)** — Endpoint inventory, communication patterns, and sequence diagram.
- **[Data Architecture](data-architecture.md)** — Database configuration, entity model, repository methods, and data boundaries.
- **[Configuration Inventory](configuration-inventory.md)** — Profiles, properties, startup dependencies, and secrets workflow summary.
- **[Business Workflows](business-workflows.md)** — Core domain workflows, decision logic, and business-sequence trace.
